title: For Those in War
body: Lord of the nations, have mercy. On the soldier. On the civilian. On the child. On the mother. On the father. On the one who has been displaced. On the one who has lost everything. Bring peace. Bring an end. Use the leaders, and remove the ones who are not making peace. We pray for peace. We pray for justice. We pray for the day when swords become plowshares. Amen.
